2605.10845.title: BabelDOC: Better Layout-Preserving PDF Translation via Intermediate Representation
2605.10845.paper_summary: As global cross-lingual communication intensifies, language barriers in visually rich documents such as PDFs remain a practical bottleneck. Existing document translation pipelines face a tension between linguistic processing and layout preservation: text-oriented Computer-Assisted Translation (CAT) systems often discard structural metadata, while document parsers focus on extraction and do not support faithful re-rendering after translation. We introduce BabelDOC, an Intermediate Representation (IR)-based framework for layout-preserving PDF translation. BabelDOC decouples visual layout metadata from semantic content, enabling document-level translation operations such as terminology extraction, cross-page context handling, glossary-constrained generation, and formula placeholdering. The translated content is then re-anchored to the original layout through an adaptive typesetting engine. Experiments on a curated 200-page benchmark, together with human evaluation and multimodal LLM-as-a-judge evaluation, show that BabelDOC improves layout fidelity, visual aesthetics, and terminology consistency over representative baselines, while maintaining competitive translation precision. The open-source toolkit and its interactive downstream applications are publicly available and have attracted over 8.4K GitHub stars and 17 contributors at the time of writing. A demonstration video is also available.
2605.10845.paper_summary_zh: 隨著全球跨語言交流的加強，視覺豐富的文件（如PDF）中的語言障礙仍然是一個實際瓶頸。現有的文件翻譯流程在語言處理和佈局保留之間存在緊張關係：以文本為導向的計算機輔助翻譯（CAT）系統通常會丟棄結構性元數據，而文件解析器則專注於提取，並不支持翻譯後的忠實重渲染。我們介紹了BabelDOC，一個基於中間表示（IR）的佈局保留PDF翻譯框架。BabelDOC將視覺佈局元數據與語義內容解耦，實現了文檔級翻譯操作，如術語提取、跨頁上下文處理、詞匯約束生成和公式佔位。然後，通過自適應排版引擎，將翻譯內容重新固定到原始佈局上。在一個精心策劃的200頁基準測試上進行的實驗，以及人類評估和多模態LLM作為評審的評估，顯示BabelDOC在佈局保真度、視覺美學和術語一致性方面優於代表性基準，同時保持競爭力的翻譯精度。這個開源工具包及其互動下游應用已公開提供，並在撰寫時吸引了超過8.4K的GitHub星標和17位貢獻者。演示視頻也可用。
2605.10845.author: Qi Yang et.al.
2605.10845.authors: Qi Yang, Xiangyao Ma, Xiao Wang, Hao Wang, Rui Wang
